<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; use Ramsey\Uuid\UuidInterface; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Stub; /** * @author Grégoire Pineau <lyrixx@lyrixx.info> * * @internal since Symfony 7.3 */ final class UuidCaster { public static function castRamseyUuid(UuidInterface $c, array $a, Stub $stub, bool $isNested): array { $a += [ Caster::PREFIX_VIRTUAL.'uuid' => (string) $c, ]; return $a; } }
